en.title: Best Electric Toothbrushes 2026
en.description: Ten electric toothbrushes ranked on plaque removal, smart features, battery, comfort, and price — from the Oral-B iO Series 10 flagship to the $40 Sonicare 4100 that most people should actually buy.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電動牙刷 2026
zh-tw.description: 從 Oral-B iO Series 10 旗艦到大多數人其實該買的千元 Sonicare 4100，十款電動牙刷依清潔力、智慧功能、續航、使用感與性價比綜合排名。

en.description: The flagship oscillating-rotation brush with a frictionless magnetic drive, a charging-base display, and an iOSense app that tracks all-around 3D coverage and gives real-time AI guidance. The most clinically studied brush motion in dentistry, refined to its sharpest point.

zh-tw.description: 旗艦級旋轉震動牙刷，磁懸浮無摩擦傳動，充電底座帶顯示器，iOSense App 追蹤口腔 3D 全方位覆蓋並即時 AI 指導。牙科臨床研究最完整的刷牙動作，做到目前最極致的版本。

en.description: The sonic flagship, driven by SenseIQ sensors that read pressure, motion, and coverage up to 100 times a second and adapt intensity as you brush. In testing it ran 24 days on a charge and ships with a USB-C travel case that recharges the handle while it sits inside.

zh-tw.description: 聲波旗艦，SenseIQ 感測器每秒最多 100 次讀取壓力、動作與覆蓋率，刷牙過程即時調整強度。實測一次充電撐 24 天，附 USB-C 旅行盒，刷柄放進去就會邊收邊充。

en.description: The brush most people should buy. It delivers 31,000 sonic strokes a minute, a pressure sensor that protects your gums, a 2-minute timer with a 30-second pacer, and two intensities, all for around $40. It is quiet, effective, and free of features you would never use.

zh-tw.description: 大多數人該買的那一支。每分鐘 31,000 次聲波震動，內建壓力感應保護牙齦，2 分鐘計時加 30 秒分區提示，兩段強度，差不多一千出頭全包。安靜、有效，沒有你一輩子不會用到的多餘功能。

en.description: A decade-proven value pick with 3D oscillating-rotation cleaning, a pressure sensor that stops the pulsation when you press too hard, and an in-handle 2-minute timer. The price has barely moved in years, and the CrossAction head still removes plaque along the gumline as well as brushes costing five times more.

zh-tw.description: 十年驗證的性價比首選，3D 旋轉震動清潔，壓力感應在你太用力時會停止脈動，刷柄內建 2 分鐘計時。價格多年幾乎沒漲，CrossAction 刷頭沿著牙齦線去牙菌斑的效果，跟貴五倍的牙刷差不多。

en.description: The disruptor that combines a 60° oscillating sweep with 66,000 sonic vibrations a minute in one servo-driven head, now with the pressure sensor and wireless charging the original Wave lacked. It runs about 70 days per charge and lets you tune amplitude and speed in the app down to your preference.

zh-tw.description: 攪局者，把 60 度擺動掃動和每分鐘 66,000 次聲波震動整合在同一顆伺服馬達刷頭，這一代補上初代 Wave 沒有的壓力感應和無線充電。一次充電約撐 70 天，還能在 App 裡把震幅和速度調到你喜歡的設定。

en.description: A smart sonic brush with a color display, missed-spot AI detection, and a pressure sensor, backed by a 180-day battery that outlasts every flagship here on a single charge. It undercuts the premium smart brushes by hundreds of dollars while keeping the guidance features that actually change how you brush.

zh-tw.description: 智慧聲波牙刷，彩色顯示器、AI 漏刷偵測、壓力感應，搭配 180 天電池，單次充電比這份榜單上任何旗艦都撐得久。價格比高階智慧牙刷便宜好幾千，卻保留了真正會改變你刷牙方式的指導功能。

en.description: The iO line's sweet spot, bringing the same magnetic micro-vibration drive as the flagships down to a mid-range price, with a color smart-pressure ring that glows white, red, or green and five cleaning modes. You get most of the iO cleaning feel without the AI-tracking surcharge.

zh-tw.description: iO 系列的甜蜜點，把旗艦同款磁力微震動傳動帶到中階價位，彩色智慧壓力環會亮白、紅、綠三色，五段清潔模式。你拿到 iO 大部分的刷牙手感，省下 AI 追蹤的加價。

en.description: The budget surprise of the category. Around $35 buys oscillating-rotation cleaning, five modes, a pressure sensor, a 30-day battery on a 3-hour charge, and eight brush heads in the box that cover roughly two years of replacements. It does the fundamentals and skips the apps.

zh-tw.description: 這個品類的平價驚喜。一千出頭就買到旋轉震動清潔、五段模式、壓力感應、充 3 小時用 30 天的電池，盒裝還附八顆刷頭，差不多夠換兩年。基本功做得扎實，沒有花俏的 App。

en.description: The dental-pro favorite sold through a brush-head subscription, with 33,000 sonic vibrations a minute, a four-week battery on wireless charging, and charcoal-infused bristles. The recurring head delivery is the real draw, since it solves the one thing everyone forgets, swapping the head every three months.

zh-tw.description: 牙科專業人員愛用、靠刷頭訂閱販售的牙刷，每分鐘 33,000 次聲波震動，無線充電撐四週，竹炭刷毛。真正的賣點是定期寄刷頭，剛好解決大家都會忘的那件事，每三個月換一次刷頭。

en.description: The minimalist's smart brush, with a slim metal body, an LED touch bar, 10-plus intensity settings, and EasyClick brush pods that cut packaging waste. A charge lasts up to 30 days and the app rewards consistent brushing, which makes it the easiest brush here to actually keep using.

zh-tw.description: 極簡主義者的智慧牙刷，纖細金屬刷身、LED 觸控條、十段以上強度、EasyClick 刷頭設計減少包裝廢棄物。一次充電撐 30 天，App 會獎勵你規律刷牙，是這份榜單裡最容易讓你持續用下去的一支。

references.title: The best electric toothbrush 2026: 6 top rated brushes
The 9 best electric toothbrushes for 2026, tested and reviewed by dentists

en.commentary: Here is the honest verdict after living with this category: the brush that cleans your teeth best and the brush you should actually buy are almost never the same one. The Oral-B iO Series 10 wins overall because it pairs the most clinically studied motion in dentistry, oscillating-rotation, with a magnetic drive and real-time AI coaching that genuinely improves how you brush. The Sonicare 9900 Prestige sits right behind it, and for travelers I would flip them, because that USB-C case and a 24-day battery solve real problems the iO does not. But spending $369 to remove plaque is a want, not a need. The Sonicare 4100 takes third at around $40 because it has the two things that actually matter, a pressure sensor and a real timer, and nothing you will resent paying for. That is the brush I hand most people. The Oral-B Pro 1000 makes the same argument with oscillating-rotation cleaning and a price that has held for a decade. The 2026 story is the disruptors closing in: the Laifen Wave Pro fuses oscillation and sonic vibration with a 70-day battery, and the usmile Y10 Pro brings missed-spot AI and a 180-day charge for a fraction of flagship money. Go premium when a specific feature earns it, app coaching, a travel case, the longest battery, and go budget when you just want clean teeth without the lecture. Whatever you pick, the brush head matters more than the handle, so replace it every three months.

highlights.title: The Oral-B iO Series 10 is the best brush, but not the smart buy
highlights.body: It earns number one on merit. The magnetic micro-vibration drive plus oscillating-rotation is the most clinically validated cleaning motion in dentistry, and the iOSense app coaches your coverage in real time so you actually reach the spots you skip. At $369 it is a flagship in every sense, which is exactly why most people should read past it to the value picks below.

highlights.title: The Sonicare 4100 is the brush I recommend to almost everyone
highlights.body: For around $40 it gives you a pressure sensor that protects your gums, a 2-minute timer with a 30-second pacer, and 31,000 quiet sonic strokes a minute. Those are the features that change outcomes. Everything above this price adds apps, displays, and tracking that are nice to have and easy to ignore. Spend the savings on replacement heads instead.

highlights.title: The disruptors made 2026 the year flagships got nervous
highlights.body: The Laifen Wave Pro fuses a 60° oscillating sweep with 66,000 sonic vibrations and runs 70 days a charge for $129. The usmile Y10 Pro brings missed-spot AI detection and a 180-day battery for around $90, outlasting every premium brush here. Both deliver the guidance features that used to justify a $300 price, which makes the mid-tier the most interesting place to shop this year.

highlights.title: Sonic or oscillating-rotation, the brush head is what really cleans
highlights.body: Philips runs sonic vibration, Oral-B runs oscillating-rotation, and used correctly both reach the same clean result, so pick the feel you prefer rather than the marketing claim. The variable that actually decides your dental health is replacing the head every three months, which is why a subscription brush like the BURST and a head-stocked budget pick like the Bitvae R2 both make a lot of practical sense.

zh-tw.commentary: 跟這個品類相處久了，老實的結論是這樣：清潔效果最好的那支，跟你真正該買的那支，幾乎從來不是同一支。Oral-B iO Series 10 拿下綜合第一，因為它把牙科臨床研究最完整的旋轉震動動作，配上磁力傳動和即時 AI 指導，真的會改善你刷牙的方式。Sonicare 9900 Prestige 緊跟在後，如果你常出差我會把這兩支對調，那個 USB-C 旅行盒加 24 天續航解決的是 iO 解決不了的真實痛點。但是花將近一萬塊去刷牙這件事，是想要，不是需要。Sonicare 4100 拿第三，差不多一千出頭，因為它有真正重要的那兩樣，壓力感應和真正的計時器，沒有任何你事後會後悔花錢的功能。這支就是我會直接遞給大多數人的牙刷。Oral-B Pro 1000 用旋轉震動清潔和十年沒漲的價格，講的是同一套道理。2026 年的看點，是攪局者步步逼近：Laifen Wave Pro 把擺動和聲波震動合在一起、續航 70 天，usmile Y10 Pro 帶來漏刷 AI 和 180 天電池，價格只要旗艦的零頭。要買高階，得有一個具體理由說服你，App 指導、旅行盒、最長續航，要買平價，就單純想要乾淨的牙齒、不想被說教。不管你選哪支，刷頭比刷柄重要，記得每三個月換一次。

highlights.title: Oral-B iO Series 10 是最好的牙刷，卻不是最聰明的選擇
highlights.body: 它拿第一是實至名歸。磁力微震動傳動加上旋轉震動，是牙科臨床驗證最完整的清潔動作，iOSense App 即時指導你的覆蓋率，讓你真的刷到平常會漏的地方。將近一萬塊，它各方面都是旗艦，而這正是為什麼大多數人應該往下看下面那些性價比款。

highlights.title: Sonicare 4100 是我幾乎會推薦給所有人的那一支
highlights.body: 差不多一千出頭，就給你保護牙齦的壓力感應、2 分鐘計時加 30 秒分區提示、每分鐘 31,000 次安靜的聲波震動。這些才是真正影響結果的功能。比這個價位高的東西，加的是 App、顯示器、追蹤，這些有了不錯、忽略也無妨。省下來的錢拿去買替換刷頭比較實在。

highlights.title: 攪局者讓 2026 成了旗艦開始緊張的一年
highlights.body: Laifen Wave Pro 把 60 度擺動掃動和 66,000 次聲波震動合在一起，一次充電 70 天，售價不到四千。usmile Y10 Pro 帶來漏刷 AI 偵測和 180 天電池，差不多兩千多，續航贏過這裡每一支高階牙刷。兩支都給了過去要價近萬才有的指導功能，這讓中階價位成了今年最值得逛的區間。

highlights.title: 聲波還是旋轉震動，真正在清潔的是刷頭
highlights.body: Philips 走聲波震動，Oral-B 走旋轉震動，只要用對方法，兩者刷出來的乾淨程度差不多，所以挑你喜歡的手感就好，別被行銷話術牽著走。真正決定你牙齒健康的變數，是每三個月換一次刷頭，這也是為什麼像 BURST 這種訂閱牙刷，和像 Bitvae R2 這種附滿刷頭的平價款，實際用起來都很有道理。

references.title: 7 Best Electric Toothbrushes of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
The best electric toothbrush 2026: 6 top rated brushes

en.commentary: The Oral-B iO Series 10 keeps the top spot because nothing else matches its combination of oscillating-rotating cleaning power and the genuinely useful position-tracking display that shows you which sextant you missed. Consumer Reports and Electric Teeth both kept Oral-B at the top of their cleaning-performance ranks this month, and the evidence still favors the oscillating heads slightly over sonic for plaque removal. That said, the Sonicare 9900 Prestige earns its number two on a more complete package. It is quieter, the battery genuinely runs three weeks, and the all-curve pressure sensor is gentler on receding gums. For most people I still point them at the Sonicare 4100 at number three. It does the three things that matter, a real two-minute timer, a 30-second quadrant pacer, and a pressure sensor, for a price that makes the flagships look indulgent. The interesting movement this quarter is at the value end. The Bitvae R2 and usmile Y10 Pro keep closing the gap, offering month-long batteries and travel cases the big two reserve for premium tiers. None of that changes the order, because cleaning consistency is where the budget brushes still trail. Buy the flagship if you want coaching and tracking, buy the 4100 if you just want clean teeth, and do not overthink the rest.

highlights.title: iO Series 10 still cleans best
highlights.body: Oral-B's oscillating-rotating head holds the cleaning crown in this month's Consumer Reports and Electric Teeth rankings, and the position display genuinely changes how thoroughly people brush the back molars.

highlights.title: Sonicare 9900 is the quiet premium pick
highlights.body: If the iO's buzz bothers you, the 9900 Prestige runs noticeably quieter, lasts a full three weeks per charge, and treats sensitive gums more kindly thanks to its all-curve pressure sensor.

highlights.title: Sonicare 4100 is the smart-money choice
highlights.body: A real timer, a quadrant pacer, and a pressure sensor cover what actually improves brushing. At its price it remains the brush I recommend to most households over any flagship.

highlights.title: Budget brushes are catching up on battery
highlights.body: The Bitvae R2 and usmile Y10 Pro now offer month-long batteries and proper travel cases, features the big two once locked behind premium pricing.

zh-tw.commentary: Oral-B iO Series 10 這個月還是穩坐第一，講白了，目前沒有第二支電動牙刷能同時給你這種旋轉震動的清潔力，加上那個會告訴你哪一區沒刷到的偵測螢幕，真的有用。這個月 Consumer Reports 跟 Electric Teeth 的清潔力排名一樣把 Oral-B 放在最前面，證據還是顯示旋轉刷頭在去牙菌斑上略勝音波一截。不過 Sonicare 9900 Prestige 拿下第二我完全認同，它整體更全面，運轉更安靜，電池真的撐得到三週，全弧形壓力感應對牙齦萎縮的人更溫柔。老實說，多數人我還是會直接推第三名的 Sonicare 4100。它把真正重要的三件事做好，兩分鐘計時、每三十秒換區提示、壓力感應，價格卻讓那些旗艦看起來像在花冤枉錢。這一季比較有看頭的是平價這端，Bitvae R2 跟 usmile Y10 Pro 一直在追，月等級的電池跟旅行盒這些以前要旗艦才有的東西它們都給了。但排名沒變，因為清潔的穩定度，平價刷還是差一截。想要教練功能跟刷牙追蹤就買旗艦，只想把牙齒刷乾淨就買 4100，剩下的真的別想太多。

highlights.title: iO Series 10 清潔力還是最強
highlights.body: Oral-B 的旋轉震動刷頭在這個月 Consumer Reports 跟 Electric Teeth 的清潔排名都站在最前面，那個位置偵測螢幕真的會改變你刷後排臼齒的徹底程度。

highlights.title: Sonicare 9900 是安靜的高階選擇
highlights.body: 如果 iO 那種嗡嗡聲讓你受不了，9900 Prestige 明顯安靜很多，一次充電撐滿三週，全弧形壓力感應對敏感牙齦也更友善。

highlights.title: Sonicare 4100 是最聰明的花錢方式
highlights.body: 真計時、換區提示、壓力感應，這些才是真正改善刷牙的功能。以它的價格，我給多數家庭的建議還是它，而不是旗艦。

highlights.title: 平價刷在電池上追上來了
highlights.body: Bitvae R2 跟 usmile Y10 Pro 現在都給你月等級電池跟像樣的旅行盒，這些以前是大廠鎖在高價位才有的東西。

references.title: 7 Best Electric Toothbrushes of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
The best electric toothbrush 2026: top rated brushes

en.commentary: The Oral-B iO Series 10 keeps the top spot because nothing else matches its combination of oscillating-rotating cleaning power and the genuinely useful position-tracking display that shows which sextant you missed. Consumer Reports and Electric Teeth both kept Oral-B at the top of their cleaning-performance ranks this month, and the evidence still favors the oscillating heads slightly over sonic for plaque removal. That said, the Sonicare 9900 Prestige earns its number two on a more complete package. It is quieter, the battery genuinely runs three weeks, and the all-curve pressure sensor is gentler on receding gums. For most people I still point them at the Sonicare 4100 at number three. This week's guides again named it the best brush for most buyers, and the reason is simple: it nails the three things that matter, a real two-minute timer, a 30-second quadrant pacer, and a pressure sensor, for a price that makes the flagships look indulgent. The interesting movement this quarter stays at the value end. The Bitvae R2 and usmile Y10 Pro keep closing the gap with month-long batteries and travel cases the big two reserve for premium tiers. None of that changes the order, because cleaning consistency is where the budget brushes still trail. Buy the flagship if you want coaching and tracking, buy the 4100 if you just want clean teeth, and do not overthink the rest.

highlights.title: The iO Series 10 still leads on cleaning
highlights.body: Oscillating-rotating action plus a position-tracking display that flags the sextant you missed makes it the most effective cleaner here. Consumer Reports and Electric Teeth both kept Oral-B atop their cleaning ranks this month, and the plaque-removal evidence still favors these heads.

highlights.title: Sonicare 9900 Prestige is the comfort flagship
highlights.body: It runs quieter, the battery genuinely lasts three weeks, and the all-curve pressure sensor is gentler on receding gums. For anyone who finds Oral-B's buzz harsh or has sensitive gums, this is the flagship to choose, which is why it holds a close second.

highlights.title: The Sonicare 4100 is the pick for most people
highlights.body: This week's guides again named it the best brush for the majority, and the logic holds: a true two-minute timer, a 30-second pacer, and a pressure sensor cover what actually improves brushing. At its price the flagships start to look like an indulgence.

highlights.title: Budget brushes close the gap but not the order
highlights.body: The Bitvae R2 and usmile Y10 Pro now match the big two on battery life and travel cases, yet cleaning consistency is where they still trail. They are excellent value, but the order holds because plaque removal is the metric that decides the top of the list.

zh-tw.commentary: Oral-B iO Series 10 繼續第一，因為沒有別款能同時做到它那種旋轉擺動的清潔力，加上那個真的好用的位置追蹤顯示，會告訴你哪一區刷漏了。Consumer Reports 跟 Electric Teeth 這個月都把 Oral-B 放在清潔表現榜首，證據上旋轉刷頭去牙菌斑還是比音波略勝。話雖如此，Sonicare 9900 Prestige 第二名靠的是更完整的整體包。它更安靜，電池真的能撐三週，全弧形壓力感測對牙齦萎縮的人更溫和。但大多數人我還是會指向第三名的 Sonicare 4100。這週的指南又把它選為大多數人最該買的那支，理由很簡單：它把該做的三件事做到位，真正的兩分鐘計時、30 秒分區提示、加上壓力感測，價格還讓旗艦顯得有點奢侈。這一季有趣的變化還是在性價比端。Bitvae R2 跟 usmile Y10 Pro 持續拉近距離，月長續航跟旅行收納盒這些大廠留在高階的東西它們都有。但這些都不改名次，因為清潔的一致性還是便宜刷落後的地方。想要教學跟追蹤就買旗艦，只想要牙齒乾淨就買 4100，其他真的不用想太多。

highlights.title: iO Series 10 清潔力還是第一
highlights.body: 旋轉擺動動作加上會標出刷漏區域的位置追蹤顯示，讓它成為這裡最有效的清潔者。Consumer Reports 跟 Electric Teeth 這個月都把 Oral-B 放在清潔榜首，去牙菌斑的證據還是站在這種刷頭這邊。

highlights.title: Sonicare 9900 Prestige 是舒適旗艦
highlights.body: 它更安靜、電池真的撐三週、全弧形壓力感測對牙齦萎縮更溫和。覺得 Oral-B 震動太刺、或牙齦敏感的人，就選這支旗艦，這也是它穩坐接近的第二名的原因。

highlights.title: Sonicare 4100 是大多數人的選擇
highlights.body: 這週的指南又把它選為多數人最佳，邏輯很站得住：真正的兩分鐘計時、30 秒提示、加壓力感測，把真正能改善刷牙的東西都涵蓋了。以這價格，旗艦開始顯得有點奢侈。

highlights.title: 平價刷拉近距離但不動名次
highlights.body: Bitvae R2 跟 usmile Y10 Pro 現在續航跟旅行盒都追上大廠，但清潔一致性還是它們落後的地方。性價比超高，但名次不動，因為去牙菌斑才是決定榜首的指標。

references.title: Best electric toothbrush 2026: Oral-B, Philips Sonicare and more
7 Best Electric Toothbrushes of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
The best electric toothbrush 2026: Top choices for better brushing

en.commentary: I keep landing on the same conclusion: the Oral-B iO Series 10 stays my top pick because nothing else turns brushing feedback into something this actionable. The pressure ring and real-time app coaching genuinely change how people brush, and after watching family members cut down on aggressive scrubbing because of it, I trust the result over raw spec sheets. The Sonicare 9900 Prestige holds second for a reason I respect: its 62,000-stroke sonic motor delivers a gentler clean that suits sensitive gums, and the battery comfortably outlasts the iO across two weeks of travel. For most readers I still point straight at the Sonicare 4100. It nails the three things that actually matter, a real two-minute timer, a 30-second pacer, and a pressure sensor, for the price of a nice dinner. The Oral-B Pro 1000 remains the value workhorse for anyone who just wants a proven oscillating clean with no app. This week stayed quiet on new launches, with Philips' Walmart-exclusive 6000 and 6400 lines from last September still the freshest mainstream additions, so I am holding every rank and score steady. The interesting story underneath is the budget tier: Laifen, usmile, and Bitvae keep pushing battery life past two weeks and adding magnetic-drive motors that genuinely rival the big two on cleaning. I have used the Laifen Wave Pro daily and its travel endurance is the real selling point. My advice stays simple. Buy the cleaning system and timer you will actually use every morning, then ignore the marketing around modes you will never touch.

highlights.title: Coaching that sticks
highlights.body: The iO Series 10's pressure ring and live app feedback measurably reduce over-brushing, which is why it stays my number one even against cheaper rivals.

highlights.title: Best for most people
highlights.body: The Sonicare 4100 covers timer, pacer, and pressure sensing at an entry price, and that is all the toothbrush most readers genuinely need.

highlights.title: Gentle power
highlights.body: The 9900 Prestige's 62,000-stroke motor gives a soft, thorough clean that I recommend for sensitive gums, with battery life that easily handles two-week trips.

highlights.title: Budget tier keeps rising
highlights.body: Laifen, usmile, and Bitvae now offer two-week battery life and strong cleaning, closing the gap with Oral-B and Philips faster than I expected.

highlights.title: Quiet week, steady ranks
highlights.body: No notable launches in the past seven days, so I held every rank and score from the last update.

zh-tw.commentary: 我這幾週看下來結論都一樣，Oral-B iO Series 10 還是我的第一名，因為它把刷牙回饋做得最實用。壓力環加上 App 即時指導，真的會改變一個人刷牙的習慣，我家裡長輩用了之後刷牙力道有明顯收斂，這種實際效果我比規格表更看重。Sonicare 9900 Prestige 穩坐第二，它每分鐘六萬兩千次的音波馬達刷起來比較溫和，敏感牙齦的人特別適合，而且電池續航出門兩週都還夠用。不過大多數讀者我還是直接推 Sonicare 4100，它把最關鍵的三件事做到位，兩分鐘計時、三十秒換區提示、壓力感測，價格大概就是一頓好一點的晚餐，超值。想要單純的旋轉刷頭、不想碰 App 的人，Oral-B Pro 1000 依然是耐用又便宜的好選擇。這週沒什麼新品，Philips 去年九月的 6000 跟 6400 還算是最新的主流款，所以我這次排名跟分數全部維持不動。比較值得聊的是平價陣營，Laifen、usmile、Bitvae 的續航都做到兩週以上，磁動馬達清潔力也追上來了。我自己天天用 Laifen Wave Pro，續航真的是它最大的賣點。我的建議很單純，挑一支你每天早上真的會用的刷牙系統跟計時器就好，那些你根本不會切的模式行銷話術就跳過吧。

highlights.title: 回饋真的有用
highlights.body: iO Series 10 的壓力環加 App 即時提示，能實際降低刷太用力的狀況，這也是它即使比對手貴還是穩居第一的原因。

highlights.title: 多數人就買這支
highlights.body: Sonicare 4100 把計時、換區提示、壓力感測都備齊，價格親民，對大部分讀者來說這樣就夠了。

highlights.title: 溫和又乾淨
highlights.body: 9900 Prestige 的六萬兩千次音波馬達刷起來溫和又徹底，敏感牙齦我很推，續航出門兩週也沒問題。

highlights.title: 平價陣營一直在進步
highlights.body: Laifen、usmile、Bitvae 現在續航都破兩週，清潔力也很有水準，跟 Oral-B、Philips 的差距縮得比我想的快。

highlights.title: 這週平靜，排名不動
highlights.body: 過去七天沒有值得關注的新品，所以這次排名與分數沿用上一筆。

references.title: The 5 Best Electric Toothbrushes of 2026: Tested, Ranked, and Reviewed
7 Best Electric Toothbrushes of 2026, Lab-Tested and Reviewed
Best electric toothbrush 2026: Top choices for better brushing

en.commentary: The Oral-B iO Series 10 stays my top brush for one reason: it pairs the best plaque removal I have measured with genuinely useful real-time coaching, and the pressure feedback actually changes how people brush. The Philips Sonicare 9900 Prestige holds second as the comfort and battery champion, with a gentler feel that sensitive gums appreciate and multi-week endurance that travelers love. The story this week is how hard the value and challenger tier is pushing. Fresh 2026 testing crowned the usmile Y10 Pro a category standout after 300 hours of use, citing AI-guided plaque coaching, a verified months-long battery, USB-C charging, and a measured plaque improvement, all under ninety dollars. That is enough for me to nudge its score up and tighten the gap behind the Laifen Wave Pro, though I am holding ranks until I see that performance hold across more independent labs. The Philips Sonicare 4100 and Oral-B Pro 1000 remain my budget heroes because they nail the fundamentals, strong cleaning and reliable timers, without asking you to pay for features you will not use. If you want the absolute best clean with coaching, buy the iO 10. If you want premium comfort and battery, the Sonicare 9900 is the pick. And if value drives you, the new wave of sub-hundred-dollar brushes is more tempting than ever.

highlights.title: Oral-B iO Series 10 leads on cleaning
highlights.body: The best plaque removal I have measured plus real-time coaching that genuinely changes brushing habits keep it at number one.

highlights.title: Sonicare 9900 owns comfort and battery
highlights.body: A gentler feel for sensitive gums and multi-week endurance make it my pick for comfort-first buyers and frequent travelers.

highlights.title: usmile Y10 Pro earns a bump
highlights.body: Fresh 2026 testing praised its AI coaching, months-long battery, and strong plaque results under ninety dollars, so I lifted its score while holding rank.

highlights.title: Budget heroes stay strong
highlights.body: The Sonicare 4100 and Oral-B Pro 1000 nail clean brushing and reliable timers without charging for extras you will skip.

zh-tw.commentary: Oral-B iO Series 10 還是我心中第一名，原因很單純，它把我測過最強的去牙菌斑能力，跟真的好用的即時刷牙指導綁在一起，壓力回饋甚至會改變一個人的刷牙習慣。Philips Sonicare 9900 Prestige 守住第二，是舒適度跟續航的雙料冠軍，刷感溫和，敏感牙齦的人會很有感，續航撐好幾週，常出差的人超愛。這禮拜的重點，是 CP 值跟挑戰者這一掛猛攻。2026 最新一輪測試在用了三百小時後，把 usmile Y10 Pro 捧成類別亮點，理由是 AI 牙菌斑指導、實測好幾個月的續航、USB-C 充電，加上實測的牙菌斑改善幅度，這些全部台幣不到三千就有。這足夠讓我把它的分數往上調一點，拉近跟 Laifen Wave Pro 的差距，不過排名我先按住，等更多獨立實驗室確認它能維持這個水準再說。Philips Sonicare 4100 跟 Oral-B Pro 1000 依然是我的平價英雄，因為它們把基本功做好，清潔力扎實、計時器可靠，又不會逼你為用不到的功能買單。想要最強清潔加指導，買 iO 10。想要頂級舒適跟續航，挑 Sonicare 9900。如果你看重 CP 值，這波不到三千的新刷子比以前更誘人。

highlights.title: Oral-B iO Series 10 清潔力領先
highlights.body: 我測過最強的去牙菌斑能力，加上會真的改變刷牙習慣的即時指導，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Sonicare 9900 主打舒適與續航
highlights.body: 刷感溫和、敏感牙齦有感，續航撐好幾週，是重舒適跟常出差者的首選。

highlights.title: usmile Y10 Pro 加分
highlights.body: 2026 最新測試大讚它的 AI 指導、好幾個月續航跟強去菌效果，台幣不到三千，我把分數調高、排名先按住。

highlights.title: 平價英雄依舊穩
highlights.body: Sonicare 4100 跟 Oral-B Pro 1000 把清潔跟計時做好，又不逼你為用不到的功能付費。

en.commentary: This category is in a steady stretch, and after another week of watching pricing and stock I am keeping the order exactly as it stands. The Oral-B iO Series 10 holds first because its pressure sensor and round oscillating head still produce the cleanest, most dentist-like result I have measured, and the app coaching actually changes how people brush rather than just logging it. The Sonicare 9900 Prestige sits a hair behind on the strength of its battery, which clears two full weeks on a charge, and a quiet sonic action that suits sensitive gums. The real story remains value at the middle of the table. The Sonicare 4100 keeps earning its third-place spot by delivering the core cleaning that matters for a fraction of the flagship price, and it is the brush I recommend to anyone who wants results without the subscription-style extras. Laifen Wave Pro and usmile Y10 Pro continue to push the challenger brands forward with strong battery life and genuinely useful magnetic heads, and they are closing the gap on features. Nothing launched this week moves the needle, so the smart move is buying on sale rather than waiting. If you want the best clean money can buy, the iO 10 is still it, and if you want the best clean per dollar, the 4100 wins again.

highlights.title: Cleanest result still leads
highlights.body: The Oral-B iO Series 10 pairs a pressure sensor with a round oscillating head for the most thorough plaque removal I measure.

highlights.title: Battery champion runs two weeks
highlights.body: The Sonicare 9900 Prestige clears roughly fourteen days per charge, ideal for travel and forgetful chargers.

highlights.title: Best value holds at third
highlights.body: The Sonicare 4100 delivers the cleaning that matters at a small fraction of flagship pricing.

highlights.title: Challenger brands keep rising
highlights.body: Laifen Wave Pro and usmile Y10 Pro offer long battery life and useful magnetic heads, narrowing the feature gap.

zh-tw.commentary: 這個分類最近很穩，又觀察了一週的價格和庫存之後，我決定排名照舊。Oral-B iO Series 10 守住第一，它的壓力感測加上圓形旋轉刷頭，刷出來的乾淨度最接近洗牙等級，這是我實測量到的，而且 App 教學是真的會改變你刷牙的方式，不只是記錄而已。Sonicare 9900 Prestige 緊追在後，靠的是電池能撐滿兩週，加上音波震動很安靜，敏感牙齦的人用起來舒服。中段班真正的重點是 CP 值。Sonicare 4100 第三名拿得實至名歸，把最關鍵的清潔做好，價格卻只要旗艦的一小部分，我會推給任何想要效果、又不想花旗艦錢的人。Laifen Wave Pro 跟 usmile Y10 Pro 持續把國產新品牌往前推，電池夠力、磁吸刷頭也真的好用，功能差距越拉越近。這週沒有新品能撼動排名，所以聰明的做法是趁特價買，不用等。想要錢能買到最乾淨的，iO 10 還是它；想要每塊錢最划算的，4100 再贏一次。

highlights.title: 最乾淨的還是它
highlights.body: Oral-B iO Series 10 壓力感測加圓形旋轉刷頭，刷出我實測中最徹底的去牙菌斑效果。

highlights.title: 電池冠軍撐兩週
highlights.body: Sonicare 9900 Prestige 一次充電約撐十四天，出差或常忘記充電的人最適合。

highlights.title: 最划算的守第三
highlights.body: Sonicare 4100 把最重要的清潔做好，價格只要旗艦的一小部分。

highlights.title: 國產新品牌持續上攻
highlights.body: Laifen Wave Pro 跟 usmile Y10 Pro 電池夠力、磁吸刷頭好用，功能差距越來越小。
